componentDescription: A versatile component for displaying a series of content slides, supporting navigation, indicators, and autoplay.

children.description: An array of React nodes to be rendered as slides within the carousel.

defaultActiveIndex.description: The initial active slide index when the carousel is uncontrolled.

activeIndex.description: The controlled active slide index. Use with 'onChange' for controlled component behavior.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the active slide changes, receiving the new index.

showNavigation.description: Determines whether navigation buttons (previous/next) are displayed.

navigationPosition.description: Specifies the position of the navigation buttons relative to the carousel.

prevButton.description: Custom React node to use for the 'previous' navigation button.

nextButton.description: Custom React node to use for the 'next' navigation button.

showIndicators.description: Determines whether slide indicators (dots) are displayed.

indicatorPosition.description: Specifies the position of the slide indicators relative to the carousel.

indicatorVariant.description: Defines the visual style variant for the slide indicators.

autoPlay.description: Enables or disables automatic slide progression.

autoPlayInterval.description: The duration in milliseconds between automatic slide transitions when autoPlay is enabled.

pauseOnHover.description: Pauses auto-play when the user hovers over the carousel.

infinite.description: Enables or disables infinite looping of the carousel slides.

direction.description: Specifies the direction of slide transitions (e.g., 'left', 'right').

transitionDuration.description: The duration of the slide transition animation in milliseconds.

stepIndices.description: An array of indices defining specific steps or accessible slides within the carousel.

views.description: Styling properties for various parts of the carousel component.
